001package net.okocraft.box.api.event.stockholder;
002
003import net.okocraft.box.api.event.BoxEvent;
004import net.okocraft.box.api.model.stock.StockHolder;
005import net.okocraft.box.api.model.stock.UserStockHolder;
006import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
007
008import java.util.Objects;
009
010/**
011 * A class that represents a {@link StockHolder} related event.
012 */
013public class StockHolderEvent extends BoxEvent {
014
015    private final StockHolder stockHolder;
016
017    /**
018     * The constructor of {@link StockHolderEvent}.
019     *
020     * @param stockHolder the stockholder of the event
021     */
022    public StockHolderEvent(@NotNull StockHolder stockHolder) {
023        this.stockHolder = Objects.requireNonNull(stockHolder);
024    }
025
026    /**
027     * Gets the stockholder.
028     *
029     * @return the stockholder
030     */
031    public @NotNull StockHolder getStockHolder() {
032        return stockHolder;
033    }
034
035    /**
036     * Checks if the {@link StockHolder} of this event is a {@link UserStockHolder}.
037     *
038     * @return whether the {@link StockHolder} is a {@link UserStockHolder} or not
039     */
040    public boolean isUserStockHolder() {
041        return stockHolder instanceof UserStockHolder;
042    }
043
044    /**
045     * Gets the {@link StockHolder} as a {@link UserStockHolder}.
046     * <p>
047     * You must check if the {@link StockHolder} of this event
048     * is {@link UserStockHolder} using {@link #isUserStockHolder()}
049     * before calling this method.
050     *
051     * @return the {@link UserStockHolder}
052     * @throws IllegalStateException if the {@link StockHolder} of this event is not {@link UserStockHolder}
053     */
054    public @NotNull UserStockHolder getUserStockHolder() {
055        if (stockHolder instanceof UserStockHolder userStockHolder) {
056            return userStockHolder;
057        } else {
058            throw new IllegalStateException("The StockHolder of this event is not UserStockHolder.");
059        }
060    }
061}
